_comment: PixelCheck v1.0 critic-calibration baseline. Captured 2026-05-02 against tests/fixtures/critic-calibration (5 labeled screenshots). Use as a reference point when investigating drift after model upgrades or critic-prompt changes. Re-record via `pixelcheck calibrate --tag <new-baseline>` and replace this file. Gate thresholds live in src/calibration/runner.ts (DEFAULT_GATE), not here.
notes: cls-layout-shift agreement is 50% (one dimension out of range by 1 point) — within DEFAULT_GATE tolerance but the obvious target for the next critic-prompt iteration.
Cost per fixture averages $0.017; full suite runs cost ~$0.08 each, safe to run weekly in CI.
Re-baseline whenever you upgrade the critic model or materially change tests/fixtures/critic-calibration/*.
